title: Allow to omit dimensions in foreach loop
body:
SystemVerilog allows to skip dimensions in a foreach loop by not specifying
an identifier name for the dimensions. E.g. the following will iterate over
the first and last dimensions, but skip the middle dimension.

```SystemVerilog
int x[2][3][4];
foreach(x[a,,b]) $display(a, b);
```

The output will be
```
          0          0
          0          1
          0          2
          0          3
          1          0
          1          1
          1          2
          1          3
```

Add support for this to the parser as well as elaboration.

Also report an error when more loop variables are specified than
the array has dimensions. Currently this results in an assert.
